name: Freelens
description: Freelens is a free and open-source graphical IDE for Kubernetes cluster management, forked from OpenLens to preserve a fully community-driven development. It delivers an intuitive cross-platform interface (macOS, Windows, Linux) with a rich extension ecosystem. Actively maintained by a European core team with a vendor-neutral, transparency-first philosophy aligned with cloud-native standards.

owner.name: Freelensapp
owner.description: A volunteer-driven community of developers and cloud-native enthusiasts building a transparent, accessible Kubernetes experience. Operates openly on GitHub with contributors from across Europe and beyond.
